description: Committed reference fixture for the agency.html-text.v1 projection recipe — the second implementation of the evidence-provenance projection-divergence conformance case checks its output byte-for-byte against `text` for each `html`. An independent implementation built ONLY from the prose spec must produce these exact strings.

cases.name: script and style blocks removed, tag and content
tags become a single space; figures across cells join
enumerated entities decode; tag-strip runs BEFORE decode so a decoded < is text
DETERMINISM CANARY — single pass, no re-scan: &lt; is <, never <
entities NOT in the table pass through verbatim
ASCII whitespace runs collapse to one space, then trim
a filing table flattens to the line a verbatim span is located in
